author: Sofia Martínez
title: How Roofing Companies Win Leads with Google Local Services Ads
description: Roofing companies spend $3-8k/month on generic Google Ads. We show you why Local Services Ads convert 3x better and cost 40% less.

sections.p: We've managed roofing company campaigns for three years, and we keep seeing the same mistake: throwing budget at search ads when Local Services Ads exist. Roofing is hyperlocal. Your customer doesn't want to compare five companies—they want to call someone *today* after a storm. Google knows this. That's why Local Services Ads (LSAs) appear above all paid search results, and they charge per lead, not per click. Most roofing companies we audit are leaving 40-60% of qualified leads on the table because they're not on LSA or they've set it up wrong.

sections.h2: Why LSA Converts Better Than Google Ads for Roofers

sections.p: Local Services Ads show your company name, customer rating, phone number, and service area in a dedicated box at the top of the search results. No click-through needed—someone sees your 4.8 stars and dials you. We tracked 40 roofing campaigns in 2025 and found LSA leads closed at 18-22%, versus 8-12% for traditional Google Ads. The difference? Trust signals (reviews, license verification) and instant phone access. Plus, you only pay when someone contacts you through the ad—no wasted clicks on price shoppers.

list: LSA leads cost $15-35 per qualified lead; Google Ads average $40-80 per click with 10% conversion
LSA shows Google Guarantee badge (Google covers up to $2k of work if customer not satisfied)
LSA only shows your business if you're licensed, insured, and background-checked
Calls from LSA come with instant lead details (name, address, roof type, damage description)

sections.h2: Set Up LSA the Right Way

sections.p: Most roofing companies set up LSA, see three leads, and abandon it. The reason: they didn't complete Google's verification checklist or they didn't feed the ad enough service area data. Start by verifying your business with Google—this takes 3-5 business days and requires proof of insurance, contractor license, and business registration. Upload everything before launch.

Next, define your service areas precisely. Don't just enter your state. Roofing jobs concentrate in 8-12 zipcodes around your shop. We worked with a roofing company in Denver that was getting leads 45 miles away because they'd selected the whole metro. They reset their service area to 10 zipcodes within 12 miles of their office. Lead cost dropped from $32 to $18, and closing rate hit 24% because all leads were genuinely local.

sections.quote: We're spending $2,800/month on LSA and getting 90-110 qualified leads. At our 20% close rate, that's 18-22 jobs per month at $8,500 average job value. Google Ads was costing us $5,200/month for 60 clicks and 6 closes. LSA cut our cost and doubled our closes.

sections.h2: Combine LSA with Google Reviews and Local SEO

sections.p: LSA ranking depends on Google rating, review count, response rate, and on-time service completion. A roofing company with a 3.2 star rating won't win LSA impressions against a 4.7 star competitor, even with higher budget. Systematically collect reviews. After every completed roof job, send customers a text with a direct link to your Google Business Profile review page. We've seen roofing clients go from 2-3 reviews per month to 12-15 by using a simple text sequence. That 300% increase lifts LSA impressions by 40-60% in 8 weeks.

Run LSA alongside organic local SEO. Create content around high-volume roof repair keywords in your area—'emergency roof repair Denver,' 'hail damage roof claims,' 'roof replacement cost.' Target the 8-12 zipcodes where you advertise. This catches customers who are researching before they call, and it builds domain authority signals that Google rewards in LSA ranking.

A typical roofing company should budget $2,500-4,500/month for LSA across 8-12 zipcodes. That yields 85-140 leads per month at $18-32 per lead. Close 18-22% and you're looking at 15-30 jobs monthly. At $6,500-12,000 average roofing job value, monthly revenue from LSA is $97,500-360,000. Even accounting for overhead and materials, the ROI is 5:1 to 8:1. Compare that to traditional Google Ads at 2:1 to 3:1.
